//: Pi model registry overrides for the OpenZerg attacker pod. The qwen/qwen3.6-plus model upstream (Alibaba) rejects requests whose system message is sent with the newer OpenAI 'developer' role, returning HTTP 400 'developer is not one of [system, assistant, user, tool, function]'. Pi's built-in compat block for this model leaves supportsDeveloperRole unset (defaulting to true), so we force it to false here. Update or remove this file if/when Pi's bundled definition for qwen/qwen3.6-plus learns the right default.
